description: Search Elastic's official EDOT and OpenTelemetry documentation for configuration guides, component references, and best practices. Use when the user asks about EDOT setup, collector configuration, SDK instrumentation, or Elastic-specific OTel features.

configuration.query: FROM edot-assistant-docs-elastic | WHERE body_semantic MATCH ?query | KEEP title, body, url, source_tier, last_crawled | SORT _score DESC | LIMIT 5

query.description: The user's search query about EDOT documentation
